name: awesome-adversarial-traffic-engineering
description: Local-only offensive browser clients for the AATE educational lab

scripts.format: prettier --write package.json tsconfig.json eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc.json lab/clients/playwright/*.ts lab/foundation-web/*.js lab/load/*.js lab/load/*.mjs tests/javascript/*.ts
scripts.format:check: prettier --check package.json tsconfig.json eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc.json lab/clients/playwright/*.ts lab/foundation-web/*.js lab/load/*.js lab/load/*.mjs tests/javascript/*.ts
